raw_consumer_statement: Citibank My Citi Prestige card annual fee came due. I paid the {$95.00} annual fee, but then downgraded the account to a Citi Costco card. The fee was refunded and I had a positive balance of {$95.00}. Citi was supposed to refund this via check. Instead Citi closed the account ( # XXXX ) and will not refund my positive balance on the account. I have called on multiple occasions. The last 2 times I called we XX/XX/23 & XX/XX/23. The account was closed in XXXX. Every time I reach out they say they will send me the check to refund, but the check has never arrived. I know Citi has the correct address on file, because I receive and advertisement from them almost weekly addressed to me ( typically a favorable loan agreement is the advertisement ).
